detail.description:
A super healing countryside simulation game, experience a different kind of laid-back life～Take a break and recharge for your next adventure!

Design soothing decorations, create delicious meals, recruit interesting staff, and fill every corner with surprises!
Become the most popular innkeeper and heal every guest!

Game Features:
Exciting business management
Upgrade your shabby old inn to a luxurious space, satisfy your guests, and earn loads of rewards! The sense of achievement is real!

Decor
